title: Fast Fiction Factory Contradictory Claim Guard

review_memory_checked.prior_signal_summary: No user review was requested or recorded for the sparse fixture probe slice; malformed or missing source-span payloads remained a named fixture class.
review_memory_checked.what_changed: A single Extraction Contract fixture now carries two source-backed, reciprocally linked contradictory claim candidates and proves they remain held instead of becoming canon or accepted Claim Ledger candidates.
review_memory_checked.what_this_review_decides: No user review is needed; this readback decides whether explicit contradictory claims are detected, held, source-traced, and kept out of auto-canon/direct adoption.
not_asking: final canon decisions for Toma fate, brass moth truth, Council motive, or which contradictory claim is true
review_memory_checked.next_nonredundant_axis: very broad source-span fixture shape, multilingual memo text, or provider-envelope readiness only after a concrete coverage need is named

known_missing_classes_before_guard: very broad source span fixture shape
coverage_decision.selected_class_reason: Contradictory memo claims remained a named fixture class after sparse notes and malformed/missing source spans; a local hold-only fixture can cover the axis without deciding truth.
remaining_fixture_class_candidates: very broad source span fixture shape
source_pack_legacy_gap_list_still_presen: missing or malformed source span payloads

prior_guard_sequence_preserved.detail: malformed guard, sparse fixture probe, weak-span repair, broad-span split, and routing regression must remain closed

concrete_conflict_gap_named.detail: contradictory memo claims must be named by existing fixture debt

hold_for_human_review.detail: non-held conflict claims=none; non-held claim elements=none

existing_source_span_and_routing_counts_.detail: source-pack rows=60; adapter elements=72; malformed accepted=0

no_review_card_or_model_api.detail: Review stays freeform/local and model/API boundary remains no-call
